Connections Archive

Past NYT Connections answers & groups

Looking for a complete Connections archive? This page lists every past NYT Connections puzzle with all four groups—yellow, green, blue, and purple—so you can study patterns or settle a debate about yesterday's board.

Ready to play today's game instead of scrolling spoilers? Open our Connections Hints Today page for spoiler-free clues and full solutions when you need them. Recent puzzles below link to daily write-ups when we have them.

Updated May 27, 2026

Spoilers below. Latest: SMALL COMMUNITY (#1080, May 27, 2026). Play today's Connections first if you want to stay unspoiled.

Why use a Connections archive?

Studying past Connections answers helps you spot recurring trick patterns—homophones, fill-in-the-blank categories, and purple misdirection. Use monthly boards for quick lookup; use today's hints when you want help without spoiling the whole grid.

FAQ

What is the Connections archive?
A searchable list of past NYT Connections puzzles with each category and its four words, grouped by month.
Where are daily hints?
Visit Connections Hints Today for the current puzzle. Recent archive entries link to dated hint pages when available.
How are groups ordered?
Groups follow the standard difficulty colors: yellow (easiest), green, blue, and purple (hardest).
